# CRONTAB(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  crontab — maintain crontab files for the current user

## SYNOPSIS
  crontab [-l|-e|-r]

## DESCRIPTION
  Manage scheduled tasks within the NexusCorp cron registry. Useful for setting up automated data exfiltration or periodic system scans.

## OPTIONS
  -l  list current crontab entries
  -e  edit crontab entries (opens default editor)
  -r  remove all crontab entries

## NEXUSCORP CRON REGISTRY
  NexusCorp monitors all cron jobs. Highly suspicious tasks may be flagged by automated security sweeps.
